title: Fosforlu Cevriyem
overview: Living on a farm with her father and stepmother, Necla, nicknamed 'Fosforlu Cevriye' because of her masculine demeanor, and her sister who drinks herself into alcohol, her life changes completely one day when her father is found dead at home. Necla will have to take on a crime she did not commit in order to find the murderer.
